text.title: PHPUnit Testing Patterns Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure for writing a clean PHPUnit test.

step.name: scaffold-test-class
step.action: Create tests/Unit/<Module>/<Class>Test.php extending TestCase. Name test methods test_<expected_behavior>.

step.name: build-fixtures
step.action: Use factory: `$order = Order::factory()->create([...])`. For non-DB objects, use data-builder pattern.

step.name: structure-aaa
step.action: Arrange (setup vars + mocks), blank line, Act (call SUT), blank line, Assert (assert*).
step.decision-gate: If asserts interleave with setup, STOP and refactor.

step.name: use-data-provider-if-multi-case
step.action: If >=2 cases differ only in inputs/expected, add `#[DataProvider]` with a static provider method.

step.name: verify-random-order
step.action: Run `./vendor/bin/phpunit --order-by=random` 3 times. Must pass every time.
step.decision-gate: If any run fails, STOP and find the shared-state leak.
